title: Fresh Berry Fruit Tart
promptText: A colorful fruit tart with a crisp pastry crust, filled with creamy vanilla custard and topped with an assortment of fresh berries, kiwi slices, and a glaze. The tart is displayed on a vintage cake stand, with a fork poised ready to serve. Surrounding it are scattered edible flowers and mint leaves for contrast, soft light highlights the glossy surface of the fruits, overhead angle.
